reasoning_model_2: Model 2 accurately synthesizes the text '[00:00-00:11] 这套新的音响设备效果真是出人意料的好...'. The speech is fluent and natural, with good prosody. model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect content accuracy and high fluency. The deciding factor is the adherence to the specific paralinguistic instruction '用圆润的音质' (Use a round/mellow tone quality). Model 1 (T1) uses a voice with a warm, lower-mid resonance and soft edges, effectively embodying the 'round' characteristic. Model 2 (T2) uses a bright, crisp voice that, while clear, represents the opposite end of the timbral spectrum (sharp/bright) and fails to convey the requested 'roundness'. Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner for following the specific timbre control command.
